backend/app/api/generation.py.purpose: Implement three generation API endpoints with full response, streaming, and model listing
key_components: POST /stream endpoint with SSE streaming via async generator
GET /models endpoint returning available models with availability status
DEFAULT_SYSTEM_PROMPT constant in Portuguese for Catholic assistant context
Error handling with HTTPException (400 for ValueError, 502 for other errors)

backend/app/core/deps.py.purpose: Add AIService dependency injection with conditional provider initialization
key_components: Conditional Claude provider initialization based on anthropic_api_key
Conditional OpenAI provider initialization based on openai_api_key
AIServiceDep type annotation for FastAPI dependency injection
Graceful error handling with logging for provider initialization failures

patterns_discovered.name: Dependency Injection
patterns_discovered.description: Using FastAPI's Depends with Annotated types for service injection (AIServiceDep)

patterns_discovered.name: Provider Pattern
patterns_discovered.description: Conditional initialization of multiple AI providers (Claude, OpenAI) based on configuration

patterns_discovered.name: Async Streaming with Event Generator
patterns_discovered.description: SSE streaming using async generator yielding JSON-formatted events

patterns_discovered.name: Configuration-Driven Initialization
patterns_discovered.description: Services initialized only when corresponding API keys are present in settings

patterns_discovered.name: Error Mapping
patterns_discovered.description: Different HTTP status codes for different error types (400 for validation, 502 for service errors)

patterns_discovered.name: Service Caching
patterns_discovered.description: Using @lru_cache to cache AIService instance and avoid recreating it

gotchas_discovered.description: Stream endpoint validates model existence synchronously before starting async generator, ensuring fast failure for bad models
gotchas_discovered.impact: Prevents wasted resources streaming invalid model requests

gotchas_discovered.description: Stream errors are sent as JSON events within the event stream rather than HTTP exceptions, maintaining stream integrity
gotchas_discovered.impact: Clients must parse error events from stream rather than relying on HTTP status codes

gotchas_discovered.description: Missing API keys or provider initialization failures log warnings but don't crash - service returns whatever providers are available
gotchas_discovered.impact: Partial service availability is acceptable but may surprise users if expected provider isn't available

gotchas_discovered.description: Portuguese language system prompt is hardcoded as default, specific to Catholic assistant use case
gotchas_discovered.impact: Only appropriate for Portuguese Catholic content generation; not generic for other use cases

discoveries.approach_outcome: SUCCESS - All three endpoints fully implemented with proper error handling, dependency injection, and provider abstraction. Generated complete API with both streaming and full-response modes, plus model discovery endpoint. Conditional provider initialization enables flexibility for different deployment environments.

recommendations.recommendation: Add retry logic with exponential backoff to AI service calls to handle transient failures gracefully
Implement request-level rate limiting on /generate and /stream endpoints to prevent abuse
Make DEFAULT_SYSTEM_PROMPT configurable via settings.py instead of hardcoded, allowing deployment-specific prompts
Add structured logging/metrics for tracking generation requests, response times, and error rates per model
Add explicit model parameter validation schema to catch invalid model requests earlier with better error messages
Add unit tests for edge cases in streaming (early disconnect, slow clients, provider failures mid-stream)
